metadata.title: Quick Explorer
metadata.description: Perform file explorer operations (and see your current file path) from the title bar, using the mouse or keyboard

regex.source: Notice("The File Explorer core plugin must be enabled to create new folders")
regex.target: Notice("必须启用文件资源管理器核心插件才能创建新文件夹。")

regex.source: Notice("File explorer core plugin must be enabled to move files or folders")
regex.target: Notice("必须启用文件资源管理器核心插件才能移动文件或文件夹。")

regex.source: Notice(`.${e.extension} files cannot be opened in Obsidian; Use "Open in Default App" to open them externally`)
regex.target: Notice(`.${e.extension} 文件无法在 Obsidian 中打开；请使用“在默认应用中打开”进行外部打开。`)
